description: Parikshak Task Database — 35 tasks across BHIV products with full graph edges

NT-COR-B-001.title: Foundational Implementation Correction
NT-COR-B-001.description: Build a basic REST API with at least 3 endpoints, a README, and a working GitHub repository.
NT-COR-B-001.dharma: Establish the foundation — a working, documented implementation is the minimum bar.

NT-COR-B-002.title: Repository Structure Correction
NT-COR-B-002.description: Create a properly structured repository with organised folders (api/, service/, model/), a README, and at least 5 files.
NT-COR-B-002.dharma: Structure precedes function — a well-organised repo signals engineering discipline.

NT-REI-B-001.title: REST API Reinforcement Task
NT-REI-B-001.description: Extend your REST API with authentication (JWT), input validation, and error handling. Add at least 2 test files.
NT-REI-B-001.dharma: Reinforce the basics — authentication and testing are non-negotiable in production systems.

NT-REI-B-002.title: Authentication Flow Reinforcement
NT-REI-B-002.description: Implement a complete authentication flow: registration, login, token refresh, and logout with proper session management.
NT-REI-B-002.dharma: Authentication is the gateway — master it before advancing to architecture.

NT-ADV-B-001.title: Intermediate API Design Challenge
NT-ADV-B-001.description: Design and implement a layered API with service layer, repository pattern, and database integration. Include API documentation.
NT-ADV-B-001.dharma: Advance through architecture — layered design separates concerns and enables scale.

NT-ADV-B-002.title: Service Layer Architecture Task
NT-ADV-B-002.description: Build a complete service layer with dependency injection, interface contracts, and unit tests covering at least 70% of business logic.
NT-ADV-B-002.dharma: Service layer is the brain — clean interfaces make systems maintainable and testable.

NT-ADV-B-003.title: Database Schema Design Challenge
NT-ADV-B-003.description: Design a normalised database schema with migrations, indexes, and relationships. Implement CRUD operations with proper transaction handling.
NT-ADV-B-003.dharma: Data is the foundation — a well-designed schema outlasts any feature.

NT-REI-I-001.title: Architecture Pattern Reinforcement
NT-REI-I-001.description: Refactor an existing system to implement clean architecture with clear separation between domain, application, and infrastructure layers.
NT-REI-I-001.dharma: Architecture is a discipline — reinforce the patterns before scaling complexity.

NT-REI-I-002.title: Testing Coverage Reinforcement
NT-REI-I-002.description: Achieve 80%+ test coverage with unit, integration, and end-to-end tests. Implement CI pipeline that runs tests on every commit.
NT-REI-I-002.dharma: Tests are proof — without them, confidence is an illusion.

NT-ADV-I-001.title: Advanced Microservices Implementation
NT-ADV-I-001.description: Build a microservices system with at least 3 services, inter-service communication (REST or gRPC), service discovery, and Docker Compose deployment.
NT-ADV-I-001.dharma: Microservices demand discipline — each service must own its domain completely.

NT-ADV-I-002.title: System Integration Challenge
NT-ADV-I-002.description: Integrate multiple external systems (database, cache, message queue) with proper error handling, retry logic, and circuit breakers.
NT-ADV-I-002.dharma: Integration is where systems meet reality — resilience is not optional.

NT-ADV-I-003.title: Performance Optimisation Task
NT-ADV-I-003.description: Profile and optimise a system to handle 1000 concurrent requests. Implement caching, connection pooling, and async processing.
NT-ADV-I-003.dharma: Performance is a feature — systems that cannot scale cannot serve.

NT-REI-A-001.title: Advanced Architecture Reinforcement
NT-REI-A-001.description: Redesign a system using event-driven architecture with message queues, event sourcing, and CQRS pattern.
NT-REI-A-001.dharma: Events are the truth — event-driven systems are resilient by design.

NT-REI-A-002.title: System Design Reinforcement
NT-REI-A-002.description: Produce a complete system design document with architecture diagrams, capacity planning, failure modes, and SLA definitions.
NT-REI-A-002.dharma: Design before you build — a system without a design is a system waiting to fail.

NT-ADV-A-001.title: Distributed Systems Design
NT-ADV-A-001.description: Design and implement a distributed system with consensus algorithm, leader election, and fault tolerance for node failures.
NT-ADV-A-001.dharma: Distribution is the ultimate test — systems that survive node failure are truly resilient.

NT-ADV-A-002.title: Production Deployment Architecture
NT-ADV-A-002.description: Build a complete production deployment pipeline with Kubernetes, auto-scaling, health checks, rolling updates, and monitoring.
NT-ADV-A-002.dharma: Production is the only environment that matters — deploy with confidence or not at all.

NT-ADV-A-003.title: Security Hardening Challenge
NT-ADV-A-003.description: Perform a full security audit and implement: OWASP Top 10 mitigations, secrets management, network policies, and penetration test report.
NT-ADV-A-003.dharma: Security is not a feature — it is the foundation everything else rests on.

GK-COR-B-001.title: Learning Module Foundation
GK-COR-B-001.description: Build a basic learning module with lesson content, a quiz with at least 5 questions, and progress tracking.
GK-COR-B-001.dharma: Learning begins with structure — a well-designed module guides without overwhelming.

GK-REI-B-001.title: Curriculum Path Builder
GK-REI-B-001.description: Design a multi-module curriculum with prerequisite chains, difficulty progression, and completion certificates.
GK-REI-B-001.dharma: A curriculum is a journey — each step must prepare the learner for the next.

GK-ADV-I-001.title: Adaptive Assessment Engine
GK-ADV-I-001.description: Build an assessment engine that adjusts question difficulty based on candidate responses using a deterministic rule-based algorithm.
GK-ADV-I-001.dharma: Assessment must meet the learner where they are — not where we assume they are.

GK-ADV-A-001.title: Learning Analytics Integration
GK-ADV-A-001.description: Integrate learning analytics to track engagement, completion rates, and skill gaps. Generate automated learning path recommendations.
GK-ADV-A-001.dharma: Data reveals truth — analytics transform learning from guesswork into science.

PK-COR-B-001.title: Evaluation Rubric Implementation
PK-COR-B-001.description: Implement a binary scoring rubric with at least 4 criteria, deterministic formula, and structured output with score and status.
PK-COR-B-001.dharma: Evaluation must be objective — binary criteria eliminate ambiguity.

PK-REI-I-001.title: PAC Detection Engine
PK-REI-I-001.description: Build a P/A/C (Proof/Architecture/Code) detection system that returns binary signals from repository analysis.
PK-REI-I-001.dharma: Proof, Architecture, Code — the three pillars of engineering evidence.

PK-ADV-A-001.title: Deterministic Scoring Pipeline
PK-ADV-A-001.description: Build a complete deterministic scoring pipeline: signal collection → rubric → formula → decision → bucket logging. Same input must always produce same output.
PK-ADV-A-001.dharma: Determinism is the highest form of fairness — every candidate deserves the same evaluation.

MT-COR-B-001.title: Intent Classification Foundation
MT-COR-B-001.description: Build a rule-based intent classifier that maps user inputs to at least 10 predefined intents with confidence scores.
MT-COR-B-001.dharma: Understanding intent is the first step to being useful — classify before you respond.

MT-ADV-I-001.title: Dialogue Management System
MT-ADV-I-001.description: Build a stateful dialogue manager that maintains conversation context across turns and handles multi-turn conversations.
MT-ADV-I-001.dharma: Conversation is stateful — a system that forgets is not a companion.

MT-ADV-A-001.title: Context Memory Integration
MT-ADV-A-001.description: Integrate long-term memory into the dialogue system — store and retrieve candidate history, preferences, and past interactions.
MT-ADV-A-001.dharma: Memory transforms a chatbot into a companion — context is the difference.

RB-COR-B-001.title: ROS2 Node Foundation
RB-COR-B-001.description: Create a ROS2 package with at least 2 nodes, publisher/subscriber communication, and a working launch file.
RB-COR-B-001.dharma: Nodes are the atoms of robotics — master communication before navigation.

RB-ADV-I-001.title: Sensor Integration Pipeline
RB-ADV-I-001.description: Integrate lidar or camera sensor data into a ROS2 pipeline with real-time processing and visualisation in RViz.
RB-ADV-I-001.dharma: Sensors are the eyes — without them, a robot is blind to its environment.

RB-ADV-A-001.title: Autonomous Navigation Implementation
RB-ADV-A-001.description: Implement autonomous navigation with SLAM, path planning (A* or Dijkstra), and obstacle avoidance in a simulated environment.
RB-ADV-A-001.dharma: Autonomy is the goal — a robot that navigates independently has achieved its purpose.

BC-COR-B-001.title: Solidity Smart Contract Foundation
BC-COR-B-001.description: Write and deploy a basic Solidity smart contract with at least 3 functions, unit tests using Hardhat, and deployment to a local testnet.
BC-COR-B-001.dharma: The contract is law — write it correctly the first time, because the blockchain never forgets.

BC-REI-B-001.title: Token Contract Reinforcement
BC-REI-B-001.description: Implement an ERC-20 token contract with minting, burning, transfer restrictions, and full test coverage using Hardhat.
BC-REI-B-001.dharma: Tokens are trust — every function must be tested before it touches real value.

BC-ADV-I-001.title: DeFi Staking Protocol
BC-ADV-I-001.description: Build a DeFi staking protocol with reward calculation, lock periods, emergency withdrawal, and a Web3.js frontend integration.
BC-ADV-I-001.dharma: DeFi is permissionless finance — the protocol must be fair, transparent, and unstoppable.

BC-ADV-A-001.title: DAO Governance System
BC-ADV-A-001.description: Implement a DAO governance system with proposal creation, voting mechanism, timelock, and on-chain execution of approved proposals.
BC-ADV-A-001.dharma: Governance is the highest form of decentralisation — code that governs itself needs no authority.

IF-ADV-I-001.title: Analytics Dashboard Build
IF-ADV-I-001.description: Build a real-time analytics dashboard with KPI metrics, trend charts, and candidate performance reports using a REST API backend.
IF-ADV-I-001.dharma: Insight without action is noise — a dashboard must make the invisible visible.

IF-ADV-A-001.title: Predictive Analytics Engine
IF-ADV-A-001.description: Build a rule-based predictive analytics engine that identifies at-risk candidates based on evaluation patterns and generates intervention recommendations.
IF-ADV-A-001.dharma: Prediction is prevention — identify failure before it happens and the system becomes a guardian.
